changelog: v1.5.29: Dynamic footer, cache-busting, post-update reload, smart What's New
changes: FIX: Footer version pulled from /api/version -- no more hardcoded stale strings
FIX: Flask sends no-store Cache-Control -- Chrome no longer caches stale dashboard
FIX: location.reload(true) after installer launches -- new version shows immediately
NEW: What's New tracks last-seen version in preferences.json (survives reinstalls)
NEW: What's New only shows updates newer than last seen -- no repeat popups
NEW: What's New header button lets user open it manually any time
NEW: data-since attributes on all steps enable per-update filtering
